falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 70 (current score: 40) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 70 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the 83% pattern match to a historical bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces a rate cut of 100 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy change would create a new market dynamic that invalidates the current pattern-based analysis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
